items.label: Journal for ImmunoTherapy of Cancer • 2021
items.title: GraphITE: Unsupervised Graph Embeddings for Multiplex Immunofluorescence Image Exploration
items.description: Developed an unsupervised graph embedding framework for interactive exploration and visualization of multiplex immunofluorescence images.

items.label: bioRxiv • 2021
items.title: Image Model Embeddings for Digital Pathology and Drug Development via Self-Supervised Learning
items.description: Proposed self-supervised image representation learning for pathology images to support downstream tasks in drug discovery and development.

items.label: bioRxiv • 2021
items.title: An Unsupervised Graph Embeddings Approach to Multiplex Immunofluorescence Image Exploration
items.description: Early version of GraphITE: unsupervised graph embeddings for exploring multiplex immunofluorescence images.
